_comment: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for correction-guide highlight categories. Matched to the printed rubric. Every surface (color-coded essay, top/bottom highlight key, manual edit modal, exported PDF essay/key/error-list) reads from here via public/js/categories.js (browser) or grader/categories.js (backend). Array order is the display order everywhere. `shortName` = compact label for the editing UI (category buttons + Edit highlight modal); `name` = full student-facing label (highlight-meanings key + PDF legend + PDF error list). style 'fill' = colored background + black text; 'text' = colored text on transparent. manualOnly true = GPT never emits it; human applies it manually (like 'delete'). The id is the persisted data-category key — keep it stable on rename; change only the labels.
